prediction.summary: An insider threat incident involving user emma.hr has been detected. The user, who submitted their resignation 48 hours prior, accessed multiple sensitive HR and legal documents, performed a bulk download of 842MB, copied the data to a removable USB device, and then connected a personal cloud sync client, triggering multiple security alerts. This activity indicates a clear attempt at data exfiltration.

timeline.event: User emma.hr performed a bulk download of 842MB archive /tmp/eh_export.zip
User emma.hr copied 842MB to removable device E:\backup on LAPTOP-HR-09
User emma.hr connected personal cloud sync client sync.evil-drop.io
DLP policy violation: HR confidential data staged for external sync by emma.hr
SIEM detected insider threat pattern: bulk sensitive file access + USB + cloud sync
SIEM noted user emma.hr resignation submitted 48 hours ago, risk score elevated
SIEM identified MITRE T1530 Data from Cloud Storage / internal collection
HR audit: emma.hr accessed 47 files outside normal role scope in 54 minutes

recommendations: Immediately disable all network and system access for user 'emma.hr' and revoke all credentials.
Isolate 'LAPTOP-HR-09' from the network and initiate forensic imaging and analysis for evidence of data exfiltration.
Block all traffic to 'sync.evil-drop.io' at the network perimeter and investigate for any successful data transfers.
Review all access logs for 'emma.hr' over the past 72 hours for any additional suspicious activity or data access.
Engage HR and Legal teams immediately to inform them of the incident and coordinate next steps.
